Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Juanita Ponsetti As Successor- In- Interest To And Substitute In Interest
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Stephen M. Fishback, Esq. of BRAYTON PURCELL 898-1555 attorney for Plaintiff JOYCE CLARK, deceased, moving to appoint Juanita Ponsetti as Successor-in-Interest and for leave to file a First Amended Complaint

Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiff's Motion to appoint Juanita Ponsetti as successor-in-interest and substitute successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff and for leave to file 1st amended complaint: Granted - no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
